title: lupinus tegeticulatus var. duranii
intro: Lupinus tegeticulatus var. duranii is a rare, endemic variety of lupine plant native to Peru, which is part of the lupine genus and legume family. The medicinal properties of Lupinus tegeticulatus var. duranii include its rich content of alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood sugar levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Lupinus tegeticulatus var. duranii has been prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are believed to aid in the management of diabetes, cardiovascular diseases, and other conditions.
